whatsNew:
SRCS Digital Ecosystem V18: The "Democratic Evolution" Update
Education doesn’t stand still, and neither do we. Welcome to V18—a massive leap forward for the SRCS Digital Ecosystem. For this release, we completely reimagined how student organizations handle leadership transitions, while relentlessly optimizing the platform's visual rendering, assessment interfaces, and database interactions to handle high-concurrency traffic effortlessly.

🌟 HIGHLIGHT: The Next-Generation Election Manager is Live!
Student leadership is a cornerstone of the campus experience. V18 introduces a completely overhauled Election Manager, bringing absolute precision and a stunning visual experience to campus voting.

The "Floating Island" Dashboard: We've introduced a responsive, fully rounded UI paradigm. The interface now gracefully adapts to any screen, featuring an ultra-compact desktop view that maximizes data visibility without feeling cluttered.

Intelligent Tie Detection & Absolute Transparency: We’ve massively upgraded the algorithmic logic behind the Live Canvassing view. The system now features dynamic tie detection that instantly highlights deadlocked races in real-time. We playfully retired the old "first alphabetical" sorting bug. If candidates are tied, the system now proudly and accurately displays them as deadlocked, ensuring absolute electoral transparency until the final vote is cast.

📝 Assessment & Intelligence Evolution
We are making exams smarter, more flexible, and highly secure.

Redesigned Quiz Interface & Strategic Skipping: We've completely overhauled the quiz UI. Students now have the tactical flexibility to skip questions and return to them later—provided the instructor has disabled the strict sequential-answering security feature.

Answer-Lock Security Measure: To maintain absolute academic integrity during flexible assessments, a new anti-tampering measure has been implemented. Once a student submits an answer for a specific number, the options are instantly disabled and locked, ensuring answers cannot be retroactively changed.

Gemini 3.1 Pro Integration: Arcee AI has been officially replaced with Gemini 3.1 Pro to power all lesson, quiz, exam, and document creation, ensuring highly accurate, deeply contextual, and curriculum-aligned generation.

Gemini 3.1 Flash Chatbot: The platform's built-in chatbot assistance has been upgraded to utilize Gemini 3.1 Flash, delivering lightning-fast, conversational support and guidance for both teachers and students.

Intelligent AI Throttling & Queueing: To maintain absolute ecosystem stability and prevent service timeouts during peak hours, we've implemented a smart throttling system for simultaneous AI use. Document, lesson, and quiz creation might take slightly longer during high-traffic periods, but rest assured your generation tasks are securely queued and will process reliably.

🚀 "Blistering" Native Performance & Fluidity
We rebuilt the rendering pipeline to ensure that even during peak traffic, the ecosystem doesn't just survive—it flies.

Canvas-Level GPU Acceleration: We are now forcing hardware-layer rendering across the entire application. By offloading heavy visual lifting directly to the device's GPU, animations and transitions are incredibly crisp.

120Hz Hardware-Layer Rendering: The interface now perfectly syncs with high-refresh-rate displays. Combined with strict memory management that completely eliminates WebView memory bloat, scrolling through long student masterlists or election results is completely stutter-free.

OEM High Refresh Rate Optimization: Resolved critical UI lag issues on devices from specific manufacturers (Samsung, Xiaomi, Huawei, Oppo, Realme, and Google). Device-specific rendering bottlenecks have been cleared to ensure the UI actually takes full advantage of the hardware's high refresh rate capabilities.

🛡️ Zero-Trust Security & Hardening
Keeping your institution's data secure is our highest priority. V18 includes critical architectural hardening specifically engineered for high-stakes digital environments.

Cross-Campus Data Isolation (Guardrail Implementation): Fixed a routing anomaly that caused occasional leakage of lounge posts and updates across different school communities. We have implemented strict, multi-tenant data guardrails. All community data is now fully isolated, highly secured, and has been securely restored to its proper environment to prevent any future crossover.

CVE-2026-0329A: High-Traffic Election Race Conditions

Impact: During massive, simultaneous voting events, database write-collisions could theoretically drop votes if hundreds of students submitted exactly at the same millisecond.

Resolution: We implemented strict atomic transaction protocols within the database layer. Vote increments are now mathematically secured and queued flawlessly, ensuring 100% accuracy even during absolute peak load.

CVE-2026-0329B: Privilege Escalation Prevention for Archived Modifications

Impact: Potential loophole where finalized or archived election data could be theoretically altered through direct API manipulation.

Resolution: Hardened the zero-trust security model. Once an election's countdown hits zero and enters the 'archived' state, the system instantly revokes all write access, locking the results into an immutable state that prevents any unauthorized privilege escalation.

🛠️ Quality of Life Enhancements & Bug Fixes
Share Button Restored: We fixed an issue where the Share Button for lessons and exams was accidentally removed in a previous update. It is now back in its rightful place, allowing seamless resource distribution.

Z-Index Layering Refinements: Fixed an issue where critical warning layers and the assessment modals would occasionally hide behind parent components. Overlays now strictly respect architectural priority.

Temporary Theme Engine Suspension (Teacher Portal): To ensure overall UI stability while we address minor visual rendering bugs, the custom theming feature has been temporarily disabled on the teacher's end. It will return fully polished in an upcoming patch.

⚠️ System Requirements & Deprecation Notice
Notice for Android Users: As we continue to push the boundaries of native performance and hardware acceleration, future updates to the Android app will officially drop support for Android 6. We highly recommend updating older devices to ensure continued access to the latest features and security patches.

Experience the Future of Learning
💻 Available now on Web & Mobile:
👉 https://srcsdigital.web.app/

Thank you for choosing San Ramon Catholic School. Your progress is our mission.
